name: Antique Brass Door Hinge
description: Heavy-duty antique brass finished hinge offering durability and classic styling.
technicalDetails: Composition: Cu 57%-60%, Zn 39%-42%, Pb 1.5%-3.0% (Lead-free option available)
Thermal: Melting 900°C-940°C, Working -20°C to +120°C
Load Bearing: 30-40 kg (4" Hinge), 40-50 kg (5" Heavy Duty)
Mechanical: Tensile 300-500 MPa, Hardness 80-150 HB, 100k+ cycles
Type: Butt Hinge (5 Knuckle), Ball Bearing / Plain
Dimensions: 4” x 3” x 3mm / 5” x 3” x 3mm (Custom available)
Hardware: 8 or 10 Countersunk Screw Holes
Suitability: Wooden doors, flush doors, main doors (Residential & Commercial)
